summary: Security hardening: plan ownership verification, feedback spam prevention (unique constraint per user/plan), server-side comment length validation, CSV injection protection, HTML escaping in email notifications.
Early adopter feedback capture: thumbs up/down widget on plan page, feedback stored in Supabase, email notification to Nicole on each submission, admin Feedback tab with stats and CSV export.

Security hardening release: middleware active, Turnstile server-side verification, IDOR fail-closed ownership checks, free plan race condition fix, admin email centralized in lib/config.ts, /api/admin/init-db gated, security headers added.
Initial launch: two-phase plan generation (outline + full plan), Stripe payments, Supabase auth, free first plan, profile form, privacy policy, Cloudflare Turnstile, GA4 analytics.
